$comment: Canonical sess:{sid} payload per SPEC-0001 §7.2. The Auth Service is the sole writer; the API Gateway is a tolerant reader. Both sides MUST agree on field NAMES, TYPES, and TIMESTAMP FORMAT (ISO-8601 UTC, RFC 3339 profile, Zulu suffix). Field additions are allowed for the writer; readers MUST ignore unknown fields. Field removals or renames are breaking and require coordinated changes on both sides. The cross-component contract tests load this fixture into the Java SessionRecord and the Lua plugin's parser.
